itemListElement.reviewBody:
My child loves coming to school every day, and I know they are in good hands. All the teachers are incredibly dedicated and passionate about their students' success. 
The teachers are not only knowledgeable but also caring and understanding.
The school has a strong focus on academics, but also provides ample opportunities for extracurricular activities.
The blend of academics and extracurricular activities are so well planned that each child gets the best opportunities to excel their abilities.
I am very happy with the development of my child who has been in this school since they were young.

itemReviewed.name: Crimson Anisha Global School - MARUNJI MULSH

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I am writing to express my extreme dissatisfaction with the quality of education and care provided at Marunji School. I believe the school falls significantly short of acceptable standards and does not deserve a positive rating.

My primary concerns are as follows:

Teacher Conduct: I have observed consistently rude and unprofessional behavior from several teachers and coordinators. I specifically name Ms. Anannaya Chhatre, Ms. Shabana, and Ms. Sumi as individuals whose conduct I found particularly concerning. I question their suitability for working with children.
Impact on My Child: Since enrolling my child at Marunji School, I have observed negative behavioral changes. My child, who was previously well-behaved and academically engaged, has exhibited concerning changes in behavior and a decline in both academic performance and common sense. I am deeply worried about the negative influence the school environment has had on my child.
School Leadership: I am perplexed by the apparent lack of oversight and accountability within the school. I question how the principal tolerates such behavior from staff and allows these issues to persist.
Profit-Oriented Focus: I believe the school prioritizes profit over the well-being and education of its students.
Based on my experiences, I have withdrawn my child from Anisha Global Marunji School. I strongly advise other parents to carefully consider enrolling their children in this institution, as I believe it poses a risk to their children's development and education.

itemListElement.reviewBody: This school is very nice 👌 👍 the teachers are also very kind. The class is neat and clean. With beautiful Computer lab , dance room , Music room(Piano and guitar room) you should visit this amazing school

itemReviewed.name: Crimson Anisha Global School - MARUNJI MULSH

itemListElement.reviewBody: There is no transparency and teachers treat themselves as Boss. They wont entertain your complaints. Not even pick up calls. WhatsApp group is admin only to continue one sided communication. This school is self boasting and do what they want to do.

Every thing is taken care of..
Keep it up!!! - CAGS😊

itemReviewed.name: Crimson Anisha Global School - MARUNJI MULSH

itemListElement.reviewBody:
This is Microsoft Based Technical School, and focuses more to train Students on Computer called ICT as subject. Very Good Infrastructure for both CBSE and ICSE board. Very Good play Ground where they arrange Annual sports events. They also reached on Farming and they have the farm in school space. School has canteen, and do have auditorium for Annual Functions.
They also have pre-primary school called TicTacToe.
